name: Persona
description: Identity verification platform. Monitor verification inquiries and access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Persona Dashboard at https://app.withpersona.com
2. Go to Settings -> API Keys
3. Create a new API key or copy an existing one
4. The key starts with 'persona_key_...'
5. Paste it below

checks.name: Persona App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Persona API is accessible.

checks.name: Persona Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Persona via API.
